gray-area-consolidation.description: When n>1, gray areas are presented in consolidated multiSelect prompts rather than multiple separate batched prompts. Maximum 8 checkboxes per prompt.

table-format-replacement.description: Step 6 Format A uses structured list format instead of markdown table for pros/cons, ensuring reliable rendering across all terminal widths

definition.scope: Two coordinated UX improvements to discuss-set: consolidate gray area presentation into fewer AskUserQuestion prompts (Step 5), and replace markdown pros/cons tables with structured list format (Step 6 Format A). Both require test suite updates.

tasks.description: Rewrite Step 5 gray area presentation to use consolidated multiSelect format
tasks.acceptance: 8 gray areas presented as 1 prompt with 8 checkboxes instead of 2 prompts with 4 each

tasks.description: Rewrite Step 6 Format A to use structured list instead of markdown table
tasks.acceptance: Pros/cons render correctly at any terminal width

tasks.description: Update SKILL.test.cjs assertions for new gray area count and format

acceptance: Gray areas presented in consolidated prompts (max 8 per prompt)
Format A uses list format, not tables
